action.reasoning: Observation: Soft distillation reached val_acc 60.50%, similar to other approaches. Best test acc 80.87%. Analysis: All approaches plateau at ~60% val acc due to noisy labels. Need ensemble or stronger regularization. Decision: Submit eval for current checkpoint, then try ensemble with ConvNeXt model.
